calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Small Claims Appeal
APPEARANCES:

Adam M. Ambrozy, Esq., for Appellant and Defendant U.S.Security Associates, Inc.
Appellant and Defendant representatives Mr. Tim Eisenhart, District Manager, and Mr. Craig Newton, Supervisor, are also present.

Mark Cato, Respondent and Plaintiff, is also present, with his wife, Mrs. Cato.

The court notes that Appellant's Petition for Writ of Prohibition and related request for a Stay has been denied by the Court of Appeal, First Appellate District, Division Three.

Mr. Cato testifies on his own behalf. The court reviews various documents, including those related to Worker's Compensation, the Labor Board, FEHA and EEOC.

Mr. Ambrozy, Esq. responds to the court's inquiries.

All documentation reviewed is returned to Respondent/Plaintiff. At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (D501)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-14-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 501
